description: Qwen3-1.7B Q4_K_M vs Gemma-3-1B Q4_K_M head-to-head benchmark. WikiText-2 perplexity + llama-bench speed + energy + cost.

benchmark_config.ppl_note: Instruct-tuned models scored over raw WikiText text — absolute PPL inflated by = Heading = markup and chat formatting mismatch. Use for relative comparison only.

comparison.ppl_note: Confidence intervals do not overlap (±0.48 vs ±0.65). 27% lower perplexity is real quality, not noise.
comparison.energy_note: 0.79 J/token for both — identical electricity cost at Q4_K_M on this GPU.
comparison.cost_note: $0.035 vs $0.036 per 1M tokens — rounding distance, not a real difference.
comparison.overall_verdict: Qwen3-1.7B Q4_K_M wins quality, speed, and latency. Energy and cost are a dead tie. Gemma-3-1B's only edge is 0.54 GB less VRAM — irrelevant with 4 GB headroom on a 6 GB card. Qwen3-1.7B is the clear pick.
comparison.vram_headroom_note: Both models fit in 6 GB with ~4 GB headroom. VRAM tradeoff doesn't matter on this device.
